## What & why

<!-- What would you like plumbline to support, and what problem does it solve? -->

## Kind

- [ ] New model adapter
- [ ] New dataset loader
- [ ] New metric
- [ ] New reproduction (paper number to match)
- [ ] Harness / CLI capability
- [ ] Other

## References

<!-- For a model/dataset/reproduction: link the paper (arXiv) and the upstream
     code repo. For a reproduction, the exact table + column + row helps. -->

## Additional context

<!-- Anything else: expected compute/data footprint, willingness to contribute
